name_cn:
Low Key bumbag
Featuring soft calfskin with elegant lines, paired with suede lining to release a trendy vibe, showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model: M83546 Dynamic Chip Version
Material: Grade A full steel hardware, imported original fabric
Packaging: Full set of original tax-free MB packaging
Dimensions: 28*13*5.5CM
